# Chief Strategist — CIO Briefing JSON Template
## Schema: chief_strategist_briefing
## Generated by: chief_strategist/synthesis_engine.py (deterministic, not LLM)

This template defines the target output structure for `chief_strategist_briefing.json`.

```json
{
  "schema_version": "bluelotus_v3_chief_strategist_briefing_v1.0",
  "cycle_id": "<cycle_id from orchestrator>",
  "generated_at_sgt": "<ISO 8601 timestamp in SGT>",
  "validated_agent_reports": 9,

  "regime_consensus": {
    "label": "<RISK ON|MILD RISK ON|NEUTRAL|MILD RISK OFF|RISK OFF>",
    "score": 0,
    "source": "macro_strategist",
    "confidence": 0.0,
    "high_beta_permission": "<OPEN|RESTRICTED|CLOSED>"
  },

  "cio_action": {
    "recommendation": "<WAIT|HOLD|REVIEW|MANUAL_REVIEW_REQUIRED|CIO_VERIFICATION_REQUIRED|RISK_REVIEW_REQUIRED>",
    "authority": "CIO_ONLY_MANUAL",
    "rationale": "<one sentence from synthesized agent consensus>",
    "orders_generated": 0
  },

  "dataset_integrity": {
    "status": "<PASS|DEGRADED|DO-NOT-TRUST>",
    "data_integrity_verdict": "<from data_integrity agent summary>",
    "degraded_sources": []
  },

  "portfolio_alerts": {
    "concentration_hhi_equity_only": 0.0,
    "concentration_status": "<DIVERSIFIED|MODERATE|CONCENTRATED>",
    "largest_position": {
      "ticker": "",
      "weight_vs_equity_capital": 0.0
    },
    "cash_pct": 0.0,
    "pnl_integrity_conflicts": []
  },

  "catalyst_watch": [
    {
      "ticker": "<TICKER>",
      "event_type": "<EARNINGS|FDA|FOMC|CONFERENCE>",
      "alert_flag": "<ACTIVE|IMMINENT|UPCOMING>",
      "days_until": 0,
      "confirmed": true
    }
  ],

  "thesis_status": [
    {
      "thesis_id": "<thesis_id from registry>",
      "state": "<CONFIRMING|WEAKENING|CONTRADICTED|WATCH|ARCHIVE_REVIEW_NEEDED>",
      "key_evidence": "<one sentence summary of evidence>"
    }
  ],

  "risk_objection": {
    "top_objection": "<specific hidden assumption or fragile chain from risk_challenger>",
    "affected_assets": [],
    "challenger_confidence": 0.0,
    "recommendation": "<RISK_REVIEW_REQUIRED|CIO_VERIFICATION_REQUIRED>"
  },

  "sector_posture": [
    {
      "sector": "<sector name>",
      "direction": "<RISK ON|RISK OFF|WATCH|NEUTRAL>",
      "evidence_quality": "<CONFIRMED|PRICE_ACTION_ONLY|CONTAMINATED>",
      "note": "<one line>"
    }
  ],

  "sentiment_tape": {
    "overall_tone": "<FEARFUL|COMPLACENT|EUPHORIC|MIXED>",
    "clean_positions": [],
    "dirty_positions": [],
    "narrative_note": "<one sentence on narrative quality>"
  },

  "unresolved_conflicts": [
    {
      "conflict_id": "<disagreement_log id>",
      "desks": ["<desk_a>", "<desk_b>"],
      "topic": "<brief description>",
      "cio_resolution_required": true
    }
  ],

  "governance": {
    "manual_execution_required": true,
    "llm_order_generation": false,
    "orders_generated_by_pipeline": 0,
    "order_routing_enabled": false,
    "execution_authority": "CIO_ONLY_MANUAL"
  },

  "agent_report_paths": {
    "data_integrity": "<path>",
    "macro_strategist": "<path>",
    "portfolio_structure": "<path>",
    "catalyst_intelligence": "<path>",
    "thesis_lifecycle": "<path>",
    "risk_challenger": "<path>",
    "forecasting_brier": "<path>",
    "sector_specialist": "<path>",
    "sentiment_narrative": "<path>"
  }
}
```

## Field Rules for synthesis_engine.py

| Field | Rule |
|-------|------|
| `regime_consensus.label` | Read from macro_strategist agent summary — extract regime label |
| `cio_action.recommendation` | Take the most conservative recommendation across all agents |
| `portfolio_alerts.pnl_integrity_conflicts` | Always populated from portfolio_structure agent key_findings |
| `risk_objection.top_objection` | Always populated from risk_challenger key_findings[0] |
| `governance` block | Always hardcoded — never computed from agent reports |
| `unresolved_conflicts` | Only from disagreement_log where resolved=false |

## Conservative Recommendation Rule

When aggregating `recommendation_to_chief_strategist` across agents, the synthesis engine applies:

```
Priority (most conservative first):
CIO_VERIFICATION_REQUIRED > REDUCE_RISK_REVIEW > RAISE_CASH_REVIEW > RISK_REVIEW_REQUIRED >
MANUAL_REVIEW_REQUIRED > THESIS_REVIEW_REQUIRED > HEDGE_REVIEW > REVIEW > HOLD > WAIT
```

The most conservative recommendation from any single agent becomes the final CIO action, unless overridden by operator block (which always wins).
